response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software development experience across multiple languages and domains, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle expertise, or any direct exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking systems — all mandatory requirements for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with diverse tech stacks
Demonstrated ability to build high-performance systems and open-source tools
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and public talks
concerns: No documented professional C++ experience on Windows platform
Lacks any mention of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge
SQL experience is listed generically without reference to SQL Server or Oracle
